languages.text: {n}В Секторе Бионика царит странное затишье. Людей почти нет, большинство операционных столов пустует. Лишь сервиторы-уборщики снуют вокруг, непрерывно распыляя обеззараживающие растворы и транслируя бинарные литании очищения.{/n}

{n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В Секторе Бионика царит странное затишье. Людей почти нет, большинство операционных столов пустует. Лишь сервиторы-уборщики снуют вокруг, непрерывно распыляя обеззараживающие растворы и транслируя бинарные литании очищения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

{n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

{n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セクター・ビオニカは異様に静かだ。人影はほとんどなく、手術台はほとんど空っぽだ。清掃用サーボットだけが忙しく、消毒液を噴霧し、ビナハリックの浄化の呪文を流している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

traits.locale_text: セクター・ビオニカは異様に静かだ。人影はほとんどなく、手術台はほとんど空っぽだ。清掃用サーボットだけが忙しく、消毒液を噴霧し、ビナハリックの浄化の呪文を流している。

languages.text: {n}仿生区出奇地安静。你的周围几乎空无一人，大多数手术台也都空着。只有清洁机仆在四处忙碌，一边喷洒去污溶液，一边播诵着二进制净化祷词。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}仿生区出奇地安静。你的周围几乎空无一人，大多数手术台也都空着。只有清洁机仆在四处忙碌，一边喷洒去污溶液，一边播诵着二进制净化祷词。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un silencio inusual reina en el Sector Bionica. Apenas hay gente por sus salas y la mayoría de mesas de operación están vacías. Los servidores de limpieza son los únicos que se mantienen ocupados, esparciendo soluciones descontaminantes y repitiendo litanías binarias de purificación.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un silencio inusual reina en el Sector Bionica. Apenas hay gente por sus salas y la mayoría de mesas de operación están vacías. Los servidores de limpieza son los únicos que se mantienen ocupados, esparciendo soluciones descontaminantes y repitiendo litanías binarias de purificación.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Sektor Bionica ist ungewöhnlich ruhig. Es ist kaum jemand zu sehen, und die meisten Operationstische sind leer. Nur die Reinigungsservitoren gehen emsig ihrer Arbeit nach, versprühen Desinfektionslösungen und übertragen binhärische Reinigungslitaneien.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Sektor Bionica ist ungewöhnlich ruhig. Es ist kaum jemand zu sehen, und die meisten Operationstische sind leer. Nur die Reinigungsservitoren gehen emsig ihrer Arbeit nach, versprühen Desinfektionslösungen und übertragen binhärische Reinigungslitaneien.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le secteur Bionica est étrangement calme. Il n'y a presque personne et la plupart des tables d'opération sont inutilisées. Seuls les servitors de nettoyage s'affairent, en diffusant des litanies binhaires de purification pendant qu'ils vaporisent des solutions de décontamination.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le secteur Bionica est étrangement calme. Il n'y a presque personne et la plupart des tables d'opération sont inutilisées. Seuls les servitors de nettoyage s'affairent, en diffusant des litanies binhaires de purification pendant qu'ils vaporisent des solutions de décontamination.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sektör Biyonika, garip bir şekilde sessiz. Etrafta neredeyse hiç insan yok ve ameliyat masalarının çoğu boş. Sadece temizlik hizmetörleri ortalıkta koşuşturuyor, dekontaminasyon solüsyonları püskürtüyor ve arındırıcı ikilidil ilahiler yayınlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Sector Bionica is strangely quiet. There are almost no people around, and most of the operating tables are empty. Only the cleaning servitors are bustling about, spraying decontamination solutions and broadcasting binharic litanies of purification.{/n}
